Re-Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanction Of Pltf'S Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Bradley Jameson, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Helen Tan

No other ppearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Helen Tan's motion for terminating sanctions.
1. Defendant's motion for terminating sanction of plaintiff's complaint denied.
2. In lieu of terminating sanction, the court orders the following issue sanction: plaintiff America Foy shall be precluded at trial from presenting any testimony or evidence in support of the allegations set forth in Paragraphs 4 through 25, inclusive, of the complaint on file herein. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF AMERICA FOY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Failure to sustain the burden of proof. The default judgment in case #621335 precludes re-litigation of issues that were decided or could have been decided. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF AMERICA FOY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO JULY 16, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. (302/PHA) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: JACQUELINE CHAN, CSR 10276

Notice Of Motion And Motio For Order Compelling Answers To Special Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
America Foy, Plaintiff and opposing party in Propria Persona

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Helen Tan's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $415 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Defendant'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories And For Sanctions; Separate Statement In Support
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
America Foy, Plaintiff and opposing party in Propria Persona

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Helen Tan's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve supplemental verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $415 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
